task_completion.description: Open the ddaC.tif image in Fiji/ImageJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji/ImageJ application window is open displaying the neuron image, with the image window title indicating 'ddaC.tif'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Sholl Analysis parameters with starting radius 10 and step size 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sholl Analysis dialog box is visible with 'Starting radius' set to 10 and 'Radius step' (or step size) set to 10.

task_completion.description: Export the Intersection Counts table to sholl_intersections.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal showing the file 'sholl_intersections.csv' being saved or existing in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/sholl/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the Sholl Profile plot to sholl_profile.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal showing the file 'sholl_profile.png' being saved or existing in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/sholl/' directory.

task_completion.description: Generate a summary text file with the required metrics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'sholl_summary.txt' containing 'max_intersections=', 'critical_radius=', 'enclosing_radius=', and 'total_intersections=' with corresponding numerical values.

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji/ImageJ GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Fiji/ImageJ interface, menus, and Sholl Analysis dialogs being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands or scripts mocking the output.

integrity.description: The exported plot appears to be a genuine Sholl Profile.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the plot is visible on screen, it should show a typical Sholl profile curve (intersections vs. radius), not a blank image or unrelated graphic.

integrity.description: The summary metrics fall within expected biological ranges.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in 'sholl_summary.txt' should be realistic for this neuron: max_intersections around 20-40, critical_radius around 40-100, and enclosing_radius around 180-250.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The image ddaC.tif is a standard sample image distributed with the Sholl Analysis plugin in Fiji/ImageJ. Expected biological ranges for the summary metrics are: max_intersections [20, 40], critical_radius [40, 100], and enclosing_radius [180, 250]. Verify that the values in the summary text file fall within or very close to these ranges to ensure the analysis was genuinely performed.
